title: Moist Bouncy Venezuelan Sea Bass Skewers
description: A halal-friendly Venezuelan dish featuring sea bass fillets, this recipe combines umami flavors with a bouncy texture, perfect for meal prep. The air-fry method ensures a moist and healthy final product.
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lime juice, garlic, ginger, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the sea bass cubes to the bowl and marinate for at least 15 minutes.
Thread the marinated sea bass cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers in the air fryer basket, leaving some space between each skewer.
Cook the sea bass skewers in the air fryer for 8-10 minutes, or until they reach an internal temperature of 145 degrees Fahrenheit.
Remove the skewers from the air fryer and garnish with chopped cilantro.
Serve the sea bass skewers hot, with your choice of sides, such as rice or roasted vegetables.
